results.name: Public discovery scope is complete and clean
results.when: When the public page and document counts are evaluated
results.then: Then it contains only successful public pages for both sites

results.name: Every public page has local clone files and raw screenshots
results.when: When the local page and screenshot assets are inspected
results.then: Then each page has an HTML clone plus desktop and mobile PNG assets with matching dimensions

results.name: Raw screenshots and local clone renders match
results.given: Given the generated visual comparison report
results.when: When every desktop and mobile comparison row is evaluated
results.then: Then all 138 raw-vs-clone comparisons pass and failures are zero

results.name: Static references resolve
results.when: When local href/src/poster references are checked
results.then: Then all referenced local files exist

results.name: Repository excludes runtime caches and private execution state
results.given: Given the files tracked by git
results.when: When ignored and sensitive paths are checked
results.then: Then runtime caches are not tracked and common secret material is absent

results.name: GitHub repository is private
results.when: When GitHub repository metadata is queried
results.then: Then the repository visibility is PRIVATE

results.name: Local public clone serves key pages
results.when: When it is served through a local HTTP server
results.then: Then the index and representative pages return HTTP 200

results.name: Public source assets are downloaded locally
results.given: Given the full public-site download report
results.when: When public static resources are counted by type
results.then: Then the local mirror includes pages, scripts, images, PDFs, GIFs, and videos with only known public CDN misses

results.name: Public interactions are inventoried
results.given: Given the raw public HTML interaction inventory
results.when: When links, buttons, forms, and menu triggers are counted
results.then: Then the research clone has a page-backed inventory for public front-end behavior

results.name: Public GIF and video media are locally playable
results.given: Given the synchronized media gallery manifest
results.when: When local media files and the gallery HTML are inspected
results.then: Then all detected public GIF/video assets exist in the clone

results.name: Downloaded HTML mirrors support public interactions
results.given: Given the downloaded local mirrors for Neuralink and Neuropixels
results.when: When a clean headless Chrome opens and clicks representative controls
results.then: Then local pages render, media loads, navigation works, and original static assets are not requested
